name: Indole-3-propionic acid
summary: Tryptophan-derived microbial metabolite with older-adult target-engagement evidence and 2026 animal/invertebrate musculoskeletal and lifespan signals.
mechanism_summary: A microbiota-derived tryptophan metabolite linked to inflammatory, neurotrophic, oxidative-stress, senescence, muscle, and bone biology; direct aging translation is still mainly animal or biomarker-level.

open_questions: Whether direct IPA dosing is safe and effective in older adults
Whether increases in serum IPA are causal for functional or inflammatory outcomes
How kidney function, baseline microbiota, and diet shape IPA response
